name: GMB - Ana Workflow (Yorum Çekme + AI + Yayınlama)

parameters.query: SELECT id, name, sector, gmb_location_id, gmb_access_token, gmb_refresh_token, system_prompt, approval_mode, response_length, info_card FROM firms WHERE is_active = true AND gmb_access_token IS NOT NULL AND gmb_refresh_token IS NOT NULL

INSERT INTO reviews (firm_id, gmb_review_id, reviewer_name, reviewer_id, rating, review_text, review_date, status, created_at)
VALUES ('{{ $json.firm_id }}', '{{ $json.gmb_review_id.replace(/'/g, "''") }}', '{{ $json.reviewer_name.replace(/'/g, "''") }}', {{ $json.reviewer_id ? `'${$json.reviewer_id.replace(/'/g, "''")}'` : 'NULL' }}, {{ $json.rating }}, '{{ $json.review_text.replace(/'/g, "''") }}', '{{ $json.review_date.replace(/'/g, "''") }}', 'pending', NOW())
ON CONFLICT (gmb_review_id) DO NOTHING
RETURNING id, firm_id, gmb_review_id, reviewer_name, rating, review_text, review_date, status

values.content:
Aşağıdaki müşteri yorumunu analiz et ve YALNIZCA geçerli JSON döndür (başka hiçbir şey yazma):
{
  "sentiment": "positive|negative|neutral",
  "topics": ["servis", "yemek", "fiyat", "temizlik", "atmosfer"],
  "importance_score": 1,
  "keywords": ["kelime1"],
  "has_critical_keyword": false,
  "critical_keywords": []
}

Kritik kelimeler: zehirlendim, sağlık, hastane, şikayet, dava, iade, skandal, gıda zehirlenmesi

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO review_analysis (review_id, firm_id, sentiment, topics, importance_score, keywords, has_critical_keyword, critical_keywords, created_at)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.id }}',
  '{{ $json.firm_id }}',
  '{{ $json.analysis.sentiment.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ JSON.stringify($json.analysis.topics || []).replace(/'/g, "''") }}'::jsonb,
  {{ $json.analysis.importance_score || 3 }},
  '{{ JSON.stringify($json.analysis.keywords || []).replace(/'/g, "''") }}'::jsonb,
  {{ $json.analysis.has_critical_keyword || false }},
  '{{ JSON.stringify($json.analysis.critical_keywords || []).replace(/'/g, "''") }}'::jsonb,
  NOW()
)

SELECT id, name, opening, body, closing FROM templates
WHERE (firm_id = '{{ $json.firm_id }}' OR firm_id IS NULL)
AND rating_range = CASE
  WHEN {{ $json.rating }} >= 5 THEN '5'
  WHEN {{ $json.rating }} >= 3 THEN '3-4'
  ELSE '1-2'
END
ORDER BY firm_id NULLS LAST, created_at DESC
LIMIT 1

UPDATE reviews SET
  ai_response = '{{ $json.ai_response.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  template_id = {{ $json.template_id ? `'${$json.template_id}'` : 'NULL' }},
  tokens_input = {{ $json.tokens_input }},
  tokens_output = {{ $json.tokens_output }},
  cost_usd = {{ $json.cost_usd }},
  status = '{{ $json.new_status }}',
  {{ $json.auto_publish ? `final_response = '${$json.ai_response.replace(/'/g, "''")}', published_at = NOW(),` : '' }}
  updated_at = NOW()
WHERE id = '{{ $json.id }}'

INSERT INTO usage_logs (firm_id, review_id, model, tokens_input, tokens_output, total_tokens, cost_usd, created_at)
VALUES ('{{ $json.firm_id }}', '{{ $json.id }}', 'gpt-4o', {{ $json.tokens_input }}, {{ $json.tokens_output }}, {{ $json.tokens_input + $json.tokens_output }}, {{ $json.cost_usd }}, NOW())
